chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَيْدِ الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا تَجِبُ فِيهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Hunt of the Al-Harram and what expiation is Obligated with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق على الظاه ر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/96)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق على الظاه ر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/96)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ بَيْضَةِ نَعَامَةٍ أَكَلْتُ فِي الْحَرَمِ قَالَ تَصَدَّقْ بِثَمَنِهَا .

en.hubeali: Ahmad, from Al Hassan, from Ali Bin Al Numan, from Sa’d Bin Abdullah who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about an ostrich egg which I ate in the Al-Harram. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Give in charity with its price’.
en.sarwar: 23. Ahmad ibn al-Hassan has narrated from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from Sa‘d ibn ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of my eating ostrich eggs in al-Haram (the sacred area). He (the Imam) said, ‘You must give its price in charity.’”
